subcodes.first_line: Move, O servant, this Pen upon this luminous and radiant Tablet, that it may recount that which causeth the Spirit to sing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرک یا عبد هذا القلم السنا علی هذا اللوح الدری البیضا لیحکی عما یغن الروح فی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
